title: NodeSpec
description: A single node (agent step) in the workflow graph. Nodes represent discrete execution units such as LLM agent calls, tool invocations, routing decisions, or I/O gates.

id.description: Unique node identifier within the graph. Must be non-empty and unique among all nodes in the same GraphSpec.

label.description: Human-readable display label for the node.

config.description: Node-level configuration object. Structure varies by node type. For 'agent' nodes this typically includes: model, system_prompt, tools, temperature, max_tokens, etc.

system_prompt.description: System prompt template for agent nodes.

tools.description: List of tool identifiers available to this agent node.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens in the LLM response.

timeout_seconds.description: Execution timeout in seconds for this node.

retry_policy.description: Retry policy for this node's execution.
